headlines: Linux Foundation, Big Tech back x402 for agentic AI payments
SoFi launches Big Business Banking — fiat + stablecoins on Solana
Bitcoin near $67K as BTC ETFs see small inflows; Ether ETFs post outflows
Crypto derivatives volumes stay huge in Q1; Binance leads, Hyperliquid climbs

articles.title: Linux Foundation launches x402 Foundation — Big Tech backs agentic AI payments
articles.summary: Linux Foundation and a coalition of big tech and payments firms adopted Coinbase’s x402 protocol to standardize machine-to-machine payments. The open foundation aims to let AI agents pay and settle across crypto and fiat rails. (Apr 3, 2026)

articles.title: SoFi unveils ‘Big Business Banking’ — fiat and stablecoins settle on Solana
articles.summary: SoFi launched an institutional banking platform that combines fiat and stablecoin rails and will route settlement through Solana. The service (and SoFiUSD stablecoin support) targets enterprise treasury, payments and 24/7 settlement. (Apr 2–3, 2026)

articles.title: Bitcoin holds near $66–67K as BTC ETFs see small inflows; Ether ETFs post outflows
articles.summary: Bitcoin traded around $66–67K on Apr 3 as spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded modest inflows while spot Ether ETFs recorded notable outflows (BlackRock’s ETHA among largest single redemptions). The flows show mixed institutional demand across BTC and ETH. (Apr 2–3, 2026)
articles.source: Yahoo Finance; ETF flow data report

articles.title: Q1 crypto derivatives volume stays enormous; Binance leads, Hyperliquid breaks top 10
articles.summary: CoinGlass data shows Q1 derivatives activity remained massive, with Binance topping volumes and emerging venues like Hyperliquid entering the top 10 — underscoring the dominance of derivatives in crypto trading. (late Mar–Apr 2026)

articles.title: Telegram’s in-app Wallet launches perpetual futures trading with Lighter
articles.summary: Telegram’s integrated wallet added perpetual futures via the Lighter DEX, offering up to 50× leverage on 50+ assets inside the messaging app — a push that brings advanced trading to millions of users. (Apr 2, 2026)

articles.title: Soluna buys $53M wind farm to power AI data center and mining projects
articles.summary: Soluna closed a $53 million purchase of a wind farm to power a new AI facility (and continued bitcoin-mining operations). The deal highlights miners’ moves to secure renewable energy and diversify into AI workloads. (Apr 2–3, 2026)

articles.title: Small public crypto firm sells entire Bitcoin treasury to pay debt
articles.summary: Genius Group disclosed it sold its remaining BTC in Q1 to pay down about $8.5M of debt. The move joins other firms trimming treasuries amid tight markets and shows continued corporate rebalancing. (Apr 2, 2026)
